The '''''Silaban''''' was a [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|CEC]] [[corvette/Legends|corvette]] and part of the [[Corellian Defense Force/Legends|Corellian Defense Force]]. It attempted to keep the ''[[Love Commander]]'' and the ''[[Pulsar Skate]]'', along with their two-[[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-Wing]] escort from making orbit above [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], but was disabled by the combined flying skills and firepower of [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] in their T-65 fighters.<ref name="Exile" />

*''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' {{1st}}
